sub_mechanisms: M_1: define weight-space 'volume' as parameter-norm sphere
M_2: compute weight-space 'bulk modulus' K_0 via SGD response to loss perturbation
M_3: fit 3rd-order EOS to (loss-pressure, weight-volume) trajectory
M_4: emit basin-stability gauge from K_0 / K_0' ratio
stripped_llm_application: Define a 'weight-space volume' = parameter-norm sphere; measure the response of this volume to loss perturbations during fine-tuning - the slope is a 'bulk modulus' K_0. Fit a 3rd-order EOS to the (loss-pressure, weight-volume) trajectory; emit a basin-stability gauge from the K_0 / K_0' ratio.
novelty_claim_stripped: Sharpness-aware optimization, sharpness-vs-flatness analysis, and Hessian-spectrum tracking measure weight-space curvature pointwise; no method fits a thermodynamic-style EOS to the loss-volume trajectory.
